channel.title: Thoughts on Robin's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Thoughts on Robin's blog

item.title: To create, or be consumed? That is the question
item.description: This is a note to myself about how to prioritize wisely. Or perhaps, it is an effort to commit to text a healthy mindset for myself. I have been trying to get into this mindset over a timeframe of some years now. I am making some progress, but it’s slow and not without setbacks. You can read it if you’d like, but this is my own advice for me. It may not apply to you.
